name: allianz-claims-extension
description: MV3 extension sources are ES modules; this marks the subtree so node (tests/preflight) parses .js as ESM. Not bundled into the extension.

scripts.test: node scripts/docs.test.mjs && node scripts/preprocess.test.mjs && node scripts/learn.test.mjs && node scripts/csv.test.mjs && node scripts/parse.test.mjs && node scripts/dedupe.test.mjs
